title: U.S. Census TIGER/Line Boundaries

supported_inputs.state: Optional state FIPS or postal hint

verification_hints: Vintage, geography level, state scope, geometry type, CRS, and join keys must be validated downstream.
Boundary geometry is separate from attribute source priors.
Landing pages and constructed path hints are not final evidence.
access_notes: Census publishes TIGER/Line shapefiles through public web-interface and FTP archive download paths.
The ACS legacy known_source layer bundled boundary hints; this SourceCard is the boundary-side migration destination.
Boundary geometry must not be treated as demographic attribute coverage.
future_verification_hints: Confirm vintage, geography level, state scope, geometry type, CRS, and GEOID joins.
Route-agent consumers must run resolver/probe/download/verifier separately.
migration_note: Boundary hardcodes should migrate to SourceCard metadata and scripts that expose vintage/geography/boundary ambiguity.
